since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.69% · Gold +0.57% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.50%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.50%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +30.94%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +30.94%, AMAT +3.08%, LRCX +2.52%, CGNX +2.23%, KLAC +1.85%. Laggards: DLR -4.08%, TTD -2.95%, HON -1.13%, SAP -1.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.34% at $163.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
